span.p: Is this a data-plane resource - Key Vault, Storage, SQL, Cosmos, ACR?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Private Endpoint
private IP in subnet + Private DNS zone

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Need reachability from on-prem or cross-VNet?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Service Endpoint
cheaper, no private IP, blocks public only from this VNet

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Private DNS zone exists for this service type?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Link the zone to the VNet - auto-resolves

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Create the privatelink DNS zone + A record

span.p:
VNet Integration
app-side outbound only - no private IP on the PaaS side
